display.purpose: Named things only: the wordmark and an active recipe's title. Never generic headings.

body.purpose: All UI text, descriptions, form content.

label.purpose: Uppercase micro-labels: category badges, ingredient tags, stat captions.

shadows.name: card-rest
shadows.purpose: Recipe cards at rest, light mode. Brand-tinted, never neutral.

shadows.name: card-rest-dark
shadows.purpose: Recipe cards at rest, dark mode. Neutral black is the one dark-mode exception.

motion.name: duration-standard
motion.purpose: Default transition duration for hover/active states across buttons and nav.

motion.name: duration-image
motion.purpose: Recipe card hero image scale on hover.

motion.name: ease-active-press
motion.purpose: Active/press feedback on primary buttons and the FAB.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main call-to-action button (e.g. form submit, save actions).
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #8B7355; color: #fff; font-weight: 700; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 0.75rem; border: 2px solid #8B7355; transition: background 0.2s, border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s, transform 0.2s; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #766248; border-color: #766248; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(92,61,30,0.15); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.95); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #8B7355; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary action button, e.g. cancel or a paired 'Details' action.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #FFFFFF; color: #5C3D1E; font-weight: 700; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 0.75rem; border: 1px solid #D6C9B4; transition: color 0.15s, border-color 0.15s; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: #A68B6A; color: #2C1A0E; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #8B7355; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Floating Save Button
components.description: Signature floating action button, fixed bottom-right, used for the primary save/commit action on a screen.
components.css: .ds-fab { position: fixed; bottom: 40px; right: 40px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 16px 32px 16px 28px; background: #8B7355; color: #fff; font-weight: 700; border-radius: 1rem; border: none; box-shadow: 0 20px 50px rgba(139,115,85,0.3); transition: background 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s, transform 0.3s; } .ds-fab:hover { background: #766248; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(139,115,85,0.4); } .ds-fab:active { transform: scale(0.95); } .ds-fab:disabled { opacity: 0.4; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Recipe Card
components.description: Primary content card for the recipe library grid: hero photo, category-colored ribbon, and a stat bar for time/steps/hydration.
components.html:
Rustikales Roggenbrot

Brot · quelle.de

4h 30m·12 Schritte·72%
components.css: .ds-recipe-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; background: #fff; border-radius: 1rem; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid #D6C9B4; box-shadow: 0 2px 12px -2px rgba(92,61,30,0.08); transition: box-shadow 0.3s, border-color 0.3s; text-decoration: none; } .ds-recipe-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 16px -2px rgba(92,61,30,0.14); border-color: rgba(139,115,85,0.4); } .ds-recipe-card-media { position: relative; height: 224px; background: #EDE5D6; } .ds-recipe-card-scrim { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(0,0,0,0.7), rgba(0,0,0,0.15) 60%, transparent); } .ds-recipe-card-title { position: absolute; left: 16px; right: 16px; bottom: 16px; color: #fff; font-weight: 900; font-size: 1.25rem; line-height: 1.2; text-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); } .ds-recipe-card-body { padding: 12px 16px 16px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; } .ds-recipe-card-subtitle { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; color: #A68B6A; margin: 0; } .ds-recipe-card-stats { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: #F5F0E8; border-radius: 0.75rem; padding: 8px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #5C3D1E; } .ds-hydration { font-weight: 700; color: #3a75a0; }

components.name: Category / Ingredient Tag
components.description: Small uppercase functional tag denoting recipe attributes (leaven type, grain type, wholegrain content).
components.css: .ds-tag { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 0.5rem; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 900; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; border: 1px solid transparent; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-tag--sourdough { background: #FDE2E2; color: #A23939; border-color: #f5c5c5; } .ds-tag--grain { background: #E2E8F0; color: #475569; border-color: #cbd5e1; } .ds-tag--wholegrain { background: #E1F2E5; color: #2D5A39; border-color: #b6d9be; }

components.name: Navigation Wordmark
components.description: The Crumb wordmark, the one place the serif Display font meets the nav bar.
components.css: .ds-wordmark { font-family: 'DM Serif Display', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.65rem; line-height: 1; color: #2C1A0E; display: inline-flex; align-items: flex-end; margin: 0; } .ds-wordmark-dot { display: inline-block; width: 5px; height: 5px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #8B7355; margin-left: 3px; margin-bottom: 5px; }

components.name: Backplan Timeline Phase Bar
components.description: Signature canvas-rendered component: a single dough-phase segment on the Backplan precision timeline, color-coded by section.
components.css: .ds-timeline-track { position: relative; height: 44px; background: #21262d; border-radius: 0.5rem; overflow: hidden; } .ds-timeline-phase { position: absolute; top: 4px; bottom: 4px; border-radius: 0.375rem; border: 1px solid; } .ds-timeline-now { position: absolute; top: 0; bottom: 0; width: 2px; background: #F85149; box-shadow: 0 0 6px rgba(248,81,73,0.6); }

narrative.overview: Crumb is two rooms in one house. Most of the app — the recipe library, the search, the import flow, the plan sheet — is the kitchen notebook: warm cream and toasted-brown, generous rounded corners, soft brand-tinted shadows, the feel of a trusted handwritten binder a small circle of bakers has kept for years. Then there's Backplan, the timing engine, which steps into the console: a near-black, precision-instrument surface borrowed from flight displays and terminal UIs, where colored phase bars and a live now-line replace warmth with exactness. The same hand designed both rooms — the console still carries the notebook's signature tan accent (#C4A484) through its phase bars and highlights — but the register shifts because the task shifts: browsing and planning is unhurried, timing is exact. This directly follows PRODUCT.md's Design Principle 1, 'Precision without sterility': the console is allowed to go dark and exact because it's carrying real timing math, but it never turns cold or corporate — it borrows the kitchen's rounded shapes and warm accent rather than reaching for sharp-edged dashboard chrome.
keyCharacteristics: Warm cream-and-brown palette for browsing/planning; a separate near-black console palette exclusively for Backplan's timing view
One workhorse sans (Outfit) carries all UI text; a serif display face (DM Serif Display) appears only for named things — the wordmark and an active recipe's title — never for generic headings
Confident, heavy type weights (black/extrabold) even within a warm, soft-cornered shell
Brand-tinted shadows in light mode; tonal layering (translucent white) in dark mode
Functional color-coding throughout (recipe categories, dough phases, hydration %, ingredient tags) rather than decorative color

rules.name: The Warmth-Is-Not-Decoration Rule
rules.body: Every color in the cream/brown system carries a job — text hierarchy, a surface layer, or the single accent. Nothing is added for prettiness.

rules.name: The One Room Rule
rules.body: The console palette is scoped to Backplan alone. It never leaks into the recipe library, and the cream system never leaks into Backplan's timeline.

rules.name: The Named-Thing Rule
rules.body: DM Serif Display renders exactly two kinds of content: the Crumb wordmark, and an active bake's recipe title inside Backplan. It never appears on a generic page heading, card title, button, or label.

rules.name: The Warm Shadow Rule
rules.body: In light mode, every shadow is tinted brown, never plain black. In dark mode this inverts: surfaces lift via translucent white overlays rather than shadows.

dos: Do keep the accent (crumb-500 / #8B7355) to actions, selection, and current-state only.
Do tint light-mode shadows brown, never neutral black.
Do reserve DM Serif Display for named things only: the wordmark, or a specific recipe's title in an active session.
Do keep the console palette scoped to Backplan; it is a distinct room, not a system-wide dark theme.
Do use color-coding functionally — categories, dough phases, hydration, ingredient tags — so color always answers 'what is this.'
donts: Don't introduce a navy/blue corporate palette or icon-in-a-box metric cards anywhere in the app.
Don't add pastel doodles, cutesy icons, or stock-photo food styling.
Don't gamify or 'cutesify' bake timing — no playful stopwatch animations, no novelty countdown treatments.
Don't let the console's dark, terminal-native palette bleed into the recipe library, or vice versa.
Don't use plain black shadows in light mode.
Don't add growth-marketing UI (upsells, social proof, onboarding funnels).
